About

Hi, I'm
Harris Su.

Portrait

A software designer from Taipei currently studying at National Cheng Kung University.

My world exists at the intersection of rigid logic and fluid motion. By day I engineer AI agents and tackle cybersecurity challenges. By design, I craft intuitive applications and artistic graphics.

Outside of screens, figure skating is where I find the same tension between technical precision and expressive freedom that drives all my work. Each project asks the same question: how much structure before it stops breathing?

Areas of Focus

Software Architecture AI agents, system design, cybersecurity
Web & App Design React, Astro, full-stack development
Graphic Design Poster design, identity, typography
Figure Skating Performance, creative direction

Get in touch
